lines.english: His rule may extend in all ten directions;
and his armies assembled, his servants and his soldiers.
He is pleased at the sight of his elephants and horses
But the noose of egotism is tightening around his neck. ||2||
- but he is just a beggar, who in his dream, is a king. ||3||
he may revel in pleasures, and enjoy many women

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਕੁਸਲੁ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਬਤਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ek kusal mo kau satiguroo bataaeaa |
lines.english: The True Guru has shown me that there is only one pleasure.
Servant Nanak has abolished his ego, and he is absorbed in the Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਆ ਭਗਤਾ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har jo kichh kare su har kiaa bhagataa bhaaeaa |
lines.english: Whatever the Lord does, is pleasing to the Lord's devotee.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਮ ਸਹਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: eiau paaeeai har raam sahaaee |1| rahaau doojaa |
lines.english: This is the way to find the Lord, our Help and Support. ||1||Second Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਨਿ ਬਿਧਿ ਕੁਸਲ ਹੋਤ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ein bidh kusal hot mere bhaaee |
lines.english: This is the way to find happiness, O my Siblings of Destiny.
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa jal thal maheeal raviaa soee |
lines.english: God is pervading the water, the land and the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਭ੍ਰਮੀਐ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਿਸ ਕਾ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: kiau bhrameeai bhram kis kaa hoee |
lines.english: Why do you doubt? What do you doubt?
One who is protected by the Merciful Lord
The Gurmukhs are saved, while the self-willed manmukhs lose their honor. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਨਹੀ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋ ਪਹੁਚਨਹਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis nahee doojaa ko pahuchanahaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: - no one else can rival him. ||1||Pause||
The Infinite One is pervading among all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੂੰ ਸੁਖਿ ਸੋਉ ਹੋਇ ਅਚਿੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: taa toon sukh soau hoe achintaa |
lines.english: So sleep in peace, and don't worry.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਜੋ ਵਰਤੰਤਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ohu sabh kichh jaanai jo varatantaa |2|
lines.english: He knows everything which happens. ||2||
The self-willed manmukhs are dying in the thirst of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਜੋਨੀ ਭਵਹਿ ਧੁਰਿ ਕਿਰਤਿ ਲਿਖਿਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: bahu jonee bhaveh dhur kirat likhiaasaa |
lines.english: They wander lost through countless incarnations; this is their pre-ordained destiny.
As they plant, so shall they harvest. ||3||
And now everywhere I look, God is revealed to me.
Beholding the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan, my mind has blossomed forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਹਰਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਆਸਾ ॥੪॥੨॥੭੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kee har pooran aasaa |4|2|71|
lines.english: Servant Nanak's hopes have been fulfilled by the Lord. ||4||2||71||
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:
In so many incarnations, you were a worm and an insect;
In so many incarnations, you were a bird and a snake.
in so many incarnations, you were an elephant, a fish and a deer.
In so many incarnations, you were yoked as an ox and a horse. ||1||
Meet the Lord of the Universe - now is the time to meet Him.
In so many incarnations, you were rocks and mountains;
After so very long, this human body was fashioned for you. ||1||Pause||
you wandered through 8.4 million incarnations. ||2||
in so many incarnations, you developed branches and leaves;
in so many incarnations, you were aborted in the womb;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਭਜੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: kar sevaa bhaj har har guramat |
lines.english: Do seva - selfless service; follow the Guru's Teachings, and vibrate the Lord's Name, Har, Har.
Abandon pride, falsehood and arrogance.
Through the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, you obtained this human life.
Remain dead while yet alive, and you shall be welcomed in the Court of the Lord. ||3||
No one else can do anything at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਆ ਸੁ ਤੁਝ ਤੇ ਹੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh hoaa su tujh te hog |
lines.english: Whatever has been, and whatever shall be, comes from You, Lord.
We are united with You, when You unite us with Yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥੪॥੩॥੭੨॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak har har gun gaae |4|3|72|
lines.english: Says Nanak, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||3||72||
Your works shall be brought to fruition.
In the field of karma, plant the seed of the Naam.
You shall obtain these fruits, and the fear of death shall be dispelled.
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam antar ur dhaar |
lines.english: Keep the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, enshrined in your heart,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਜਾਸ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nit gaaveh har har gun jaas |1|
lines.english: Sing continually the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||
Be always attentive to your God;
and your affairs shall be quickly resolved. ||1||Pause||
thus you shall be honored in His Court.
